title: imgui
description: Dear ImGui: Bloat-free Graphical User interface for C++ with minimal dependencies
notes: 即时模式 GUI 库，非常适合构建轻量级关卡编辑器 UI 或游戏内调试工具

title: Bolts-ObjC
description: Bolts is a collection of low-level libraries designed to make developing mobile apps easier.
notes: 成熟的移动端底层辅助库，近期活跃度较低但仍有参考价值

title: Bolts-Android
description: Bolts is a collection of low-level libraries designed to make developing mobile apps easier.
notes: 已归档的 Android 版 Bolts，历史参考价值
